BIO999L — Microbiology Lab (fictional) — Spring 2026

Lab schedule (extracted table rows)

Lab 1 WTh 2/10,11 Orientation and safety briefing
Lab 2 M T 2/17,18 Exercise 1: Pipetting basics
Lab 3 W TH 2/19-20 Exercise 2: Gram stain 3A: Colony morphology notes
Lab 13 W TH 4/1-2 LAB PRACTICAL 1
Lab 27 W TH 5/6/7 Lab Practical 2 review stations

Pre-lab quiz column values (1, 2, 3) are preparation numbers, not separate assignments.
